content:
• A passive benefit in the final project grading rubric (Professor’s discretion).

📜 The Consequence of Breaking the Vow
✔ If they engage in XP-based mechanics at any point, they permanently lose their ascetic path benefits.
✔ They must instead complete an additional analytical essay on themes of restraint, self-denial, and temptation in literature.

✅ Why This Works:
• Allows for complete disengagement from the game while still offering structured rewards.
• Gives students an option to “play” by not playing—philosophically mirroring ascetic traditions.
• Creates a fascinating contrast between engagement-based paths and self-denial paths.

📜 2. Final Lock-In Adjustments: Penalties for Failed One-Shot Actions

📜 One-shot actions now impose extended consequences.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 211 (chunk 211/555)
